reviews.title: Guest Experience
reviews.subtitle: What Our Guests Say
reviews.empty_desc: Be the first to share your experience with us.

upgrade.default_description: This feature is available on the Pro plan.

qa-writeback.title: Ask a question
qa-writeback.description: Let guests submit questions directly from your site, synced back to Google Business Q&A. Included in Pro.

custom-domain.title: Custom domain
custom-domain.description: Connect your own domain (yourdomain.com) instead of a krabiclaw.com subdomain. Included in Pro.

add-location.title: Add a second location
add-location.description: Manage multiple locations under one brand site, each with their own menu, reviews, and hours. Included in Pro.

connect-gmb.title: Connect Google Business
connect-gmb.description: Sync hours, reviews, photos, and posts automatically from your Google Business Profile. Included in Pro.

google-business-sync.title: Google Business sync
google-business-sync.description: Auto-sync Google Business fields while keeping manual edits available in the site editor. Included in Pro.

remove-branding.title: Remove KrabiClaw branding
remove-branding.description: Remove the "Powered by krabiclaw.com" footer strip from your tenant site. Included in Pro.

bullets.gmb_1: Auto-fill Google Business fields when connected
bullets.gmb_2: Keep manual edits available in the content editor
bullets.gmb_3: Sync business details, hours, photos, reviews, and posts
bullets.default_3: Keep the rest of your current site setup

about.default_description: Experience the essence of Japanese culinary tradition in the heart of Krabi.

qa.title: Questions & Answers
qa.subtitle: Common Inquiries
qa.empty_prompt: Got a question? Ask us anything about our menu or service.
